problem.title: Symmetric Binary Tree Check
problem.description:
Problem Statement:
Check whether a given binary tree is symmetric around its center.

Input Format:
- First line contains integer N
- Second line contains level-order traversal (-1 indicates NULL)

Output Format:
- Print YES if symmetric, otherwise NO

Example:
Input:
7
1 2 2 3 4 4 3

Output:
YES

Explanation:
Left subtree is a mirror image of the right subtree.

solution.explanation: Check symmetry by treating the array as a binary heap; recursively compare left child of one node with right child of the other and vice versa, treating indices beyond n as NULL.
